methodology: Documentation-only pass. No live browser automation, no authenticated sessions, no production/staging URLs were exercised in the environment that produced this file.

anonymous.notes: Requires scripted or manual session matrix (no cookies in this pass).

free.notes: Define free-tier test account policy; do not use production PII.

paid_rn.notes: Use Stripe test mode + test subscriber only.

blockingReason: E2E and tri-role paywall validation require a dedicated QA run (Playwright/Cypress or manual checklist) with test accounts and explicit approval. This artifact reserves the schema for logging failures when that run occurs.
recommendedExecution: Run nursenest-core e2e suite if present under e2e/ with BASE_URL and test credentials in CI secrets.
Record route-level failures with URL, role, expected vs actual HTTP status, and screenshot path (admin-only storage).
Cross-check paywall with data/audit/paywall-final-security.json after each release.
